lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Hello there, I'm Captain Bruce. Do you want to serve in the Shayzien Army and defend our kingdom?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'd love to join.

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Wonderful! To get started, you need to answer a few questions.

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Are you a resident of Kourend?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errrr... Not really.

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Ah. Then you cannot join I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How come?

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: It's in the rules I'm afraid. Only citizens of Kourend are allowed to join the Shayzien Army.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that not too restrictive?

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Well at one time only citizens of Shayzien could join the army. It wasn't until the reign of King Byrne I that people from other parts of the kingdom were allowed to enlist.

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Of course, many people in Kourend still like to stick to tradition. After all, the five cities of Kourend have always had very defined roles within the kingdom.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting. So most people in the army are still from Shayzien?

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Indeed. While the Shayzien Army is by far the largest military force in Kourend, the other cities still have some form of militia, apart from Arceuus of course.

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Even if someone from elsewhere in the kingdom wants to become a soldier, they're far more likely to join their local city force than come to us.

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Still, times are slowly changing. Every year we see more people from outside Shayzien enlist.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: My pleasure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm not interested.

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: That's alright. Come back if you change your mind.

sections.title: Talking again while holding the light or puzzle box

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: That doesn't look solved to me.

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Well done [player name]. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Captain Bruce
lines.text: Here, solve this.
